name: Avocado Salad Jelled
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
2. Chill until consistency of unbeaten egg white.
3. Combine avocado and cream cheese; beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until blended.
4. Stir in pineapple and pecans.
5. Combine avocado mixture with gelatin mixture; beat well.
6. Pour into a lightly oiled 8-inch square pan.
7. Cover and chill until firm.
10-12 servings. Bon appétit
